element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Rewards exploration; accessed by touching from side
Opens orange treasure chests; teaches color-gating mechanic
Opens any treasure chest by touch; removes chest interaction requirement
Converts all on-screen enemies to coins for 5 seconds; offensive power
Adds 10 seconds to timer; resource management introduced
Teaches hidden discovery mechanic; unlocks secret passages
Bomb-collection sequence; direct port of original Bomb Jack mechanics
Triggered by collecting 10+ Mighty Coins or 100+ seconds; requires jump sequence to escape
Hidden breakable blocks; international versions made single-jump breakable
Behavior described as near-random; requires anticipation for evasion
Core pressure system; determines pacing throughout run

typical_relief_triggers: Completing action zone (transition to familiar Royal Palace)
Green coin activation (5-second enemy immunity window)
typical_tension_triggers: Attempting to access color-locked treasure chests
Approaching 10 Mighty Coins or 100 seconds (Torture Room threshold)
Hidden block discoveries requiring multiple jumps
Royal Palace bomb collection under time pressure
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Fast-paced action-adventure with escalating greed penalties; alternates between exploration tension (action zones) and reflexive navigation tension (Royal Palace); timer creates constant pressure with strategic relief opportunities

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Treasure chests (visible and hidden); Sphinx icons trigger secret passages; breakable blocks indicate hidden areas
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Hidden treasure chests contain Sphinx item to unlock secret passages; undocumented breakable blocks hide passages; secrets heavily emphasized as replay value

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-phase introduction of Mighty Coins, basic platforming, visible treasure chests; safe exploration encouraged
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Multiple color-gated chests requiring strategic coin collection; hidden secrets proliferate; enemy behavior becomes critical to navigation
difficulty_curve.late_game: Increased Torture Room risk as player accumulates coins and timer bonuses; near-random enemy patterns demand precise anticipation; Royal Palace sections maintain steady difficulty
notable_spikes: First Torture Room encounter (introduces penalty state mechanic)
Transition to hidden block discovery requirements (changes safe exploration assumption)
Late-stage Royal Palace rooms under cumulative time pressure

notable_level_patterns.pattern_name: Action Zone → Royal Palace Binary Structure
notable_level_patterns.description: Every level split into two distinct sections: exploration-focused action zone (Mighty Coin hunting, secret discovery), followed by reflexive bomb-collection Royal Palace room (direct Bomb Jack port). Creates rhythm cycle of strategic thinking then execution.
Torture Room activated if player collects 10+ Mighty Coins or extends timer to 100+ seconds. Forces choice between power-up accumulation and safety. Resets coins and timer to 60s upon escape.
Treasure chests locked by Mighty Coin color (orange requires blue coin, etc.). Teaches resource-type gating early; orange coin breaks this by making all chests accessible via touch.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Early-mid levels establish; blue coins appear first

notable_level_patterns.description: Finding Sphinx in treasure chest unlocks secret passages; alternative routing through levels. Incentivizes thorough chest exploration and replay.
